title: Great Hymn to Osiris
description: The most complete Egyptian hymn to Osiris: his murder by Set, his resurrection by Isis, and his reign over the dead.
introduction: The most complete Egyptian hymn to Osiris: his murder by Set, his resurrection by Isis, and his reign over the dead.

translation.text: Hail to you, Osiris, lord of eternity, king of the gods! You died and yet you live. You were overthrown and yet you endure.
